name: dev953
description: Exposes dev953's autonomous multi-agent coding method as callable tools.
long_description: A zero-dependency Node stdio MCP server that exposes dev953's METHOD as callable tools: the 9-phase lifecycle plan, the YAGNI ladder, the swarm fan-out recipe, the discipline review, and the publish checklist. It advises and coordinates so any MCP-capable assistant can borrow dev953's way of working; it does NOT run the swarm, spawn worktrees, run git, or build anything itself. Needs only Node — no npm install, no build step, no API keys.

tools.name: dev953_lifecycle_plan
tools.description: Returns dev953's 9-phase lifecycle plan with a per-phase acceptance-criteria template tailored to the given idea.

tools.name: dev953_yagni_check
tools.description: Applies dev953's YAGNI ladder to a proposed feature as pointed, ordered questions ending with the smallest version that works.

tools.name: dev953_swarm_recipe
tools.description: Returns dev953's swarm protocol for a unit of work: freeze, fan out, score, keep the smallest correct winner, revert, repeat.

tools.name: dev953_discipline_review
tools.description: Applies dev953's discipline checklist (plan-before-build, test-before-done, data-not-instructions, secrets, adversarial done) to a plan.

tools.name: dev953_publish_checklist
tools.description: Returns dev953's private-by-default publish checklist: one clean commit, de-attribution, secret scan, sole author, explicit public gate.
